policy_issues.description: The title contains the phrase 'Best Quality', which is a prohibited superlative claim.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove 'Best Quality' and replace with factual descriptors like 'Premium' or 'High-Quality'.

policy_issues.description: Bullet point includes 'Limited Time Offer - 50% Off', which is promotional pricing language not allowed in standard listings.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove promotional pricing language. Use only factual product features.

policy_issues.description: Description states 'Cures headaches and improves vision', which is an unapproved medical claim.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove all medical claims unless the product is approved for such claims. Use general wellness language like 'supports relaxation'.

policy_issues.description: Title is in all capital letters, which violates formatting guidelines.
policy_issues.suggestion: Convert title to standard capitalization (first letter of each word capitalized, except articles and prepositions).

action_items: Remove 'Best Quality' and replace with factual descriptors like 'Premium' or 'High-Quality'.
Remove promotional pricing language. Use only factual product features.
Remove all medical claims unless the product is approved for such claims. Use general wellness language like 'supports relaxation'.
Convert title to standard capitalization (first letter of each word capitalized, except articles and prepositions).
